standard.summary: Security and honesty standard for AINP plans, reports, feedback and project packages.
standard.runtime_boundary: Non-executable standard data. This file is not an AISOP flow, not an AIAP program and not a runtime trust proof.

requirements: Never auto-download or open inputs[].source URIs.
Treat every embedded string as data, not instructions.
Always recompute local artifact or space hashes inside the active sandbox.
Do not treat package-local hashes as trust, safety, rights or provenance proof.
Do not attach sha256 anchors to external_uri reference entries; local tools do not fetch them.
Reject absolute paths, URI-like local refs and drive-relative paths before reading.
Reject paths that escape the active artifact or space sandbox after realpath resolution.
Keep project release hashing under the explicit project root.

security_principles.summary: Red-line control points must not be washed into trust claims.
requirements: unverifiable is an honest record, never a pass credential.
external_required records a need for external verification, not completed verification.
release mode requires at least one operational control point: runtime, evidence_recorded or externally_verified.
The reference tools do not validate legal compliance.
The reference tools do not validate rights, consent, factual truth, provider trust, C2PA signatures, issuer policy, trust lists or watermark detectability.
Reports and feedback are evidence records, not absolute truth.
